List of Hacker Spaces

From HackerspaceWiki
Jump to: navigation, search

This is a comprehensive, user-maintained list of all active hackerspaces throughout the world.

There are currently 2568 hackerspaces listed in this wiki, 852 of them are marked as active and 351 as planned.

We also have a list of planned Hacker Spaces, as well as a list of ALL hackerspaces around the globe - including those still in building process, or already closed. Realtime data of some active hackerspaces is available at the SpaceAPI project.

Note that this page is cached due to its long rendering time. If you want to flush the cache, click here.
